scripts.dev: npx --yes concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build:all && npm run type-check -w @ori/api && npm run db:verify-migrations -w @ori/api && npm run build:check -w @ori/web && npm run test
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ori/shared && npm run build -w @ori/web
